decision_basis: DoD-1〜10 全 PASS + CI green + bypass-cooldown 容認 (bootstrap_phase)
review_notes: All creator-kit files are represented in residual-inventory.json.
Every record has one of the four allowed verdict_tentative values.
Delete records satisfy bidirectional condition: duplicate_of_plugin OR pyc/cache asset.
_bootstrap/, install.sh, and install.ps1 are classified as keep-non-plugin.
All migrate-to-plugin records carry target_plugin field (null pending phase2-02 confirmation).
All keep-non-plugin records carry explicit reason.
Section 4 explicitly lists manifest.json / governance-log / plugin-pilot quality as out-of-scope.
